edges.description: Distal 15q dosage gain can increase IGF1R expression and downstream growth signaling.
edges.target: IGF1R Overexpression and Growth Signaling Activation

edges.description: Increased IGF1R signaling contributes to postnatal somatic overgrowth.
edges.source: IGF1R Overexpression and Growth Signaling Activation

edges.description: Dysregulated growth signaling is associated with neurodevelopmental impairment in this subtype.
edges.source: IGF1R Overexpression and Growth Signaling Activation

edges.description: The same dosage-gain syndrome frequently includes congenital renal malformations.
edges.source: IGF1R Overexpression and Growth Signaling Activation

edges.description: FIBP dysfunction alters growth-control pathways and increases fibroblast proliferation.
Increased fibroblast proliferative capacity is consistent with the generalized overgrowth phenotype.
FIBP dysfunction is linked to developmental and cognitive impairment in affected patients.
The same syndrome includes renal dysplasia and related urinary tract anomalies.

edges.target: IGF1R Overexpression and Growth Signaling Activation

nodes.description: In one major subtype branch, distal chromosome 15q trisomy or tetrasomy increases dosage of growth-regulatory genes, especially IGF1R, creating a syndromic overgrowth and renal-anomaly phenotype.

evidence.reference_title: 15q overgrowth syndrome: A newly recognized phenotype associated with overgrowth, learning difficulties, characteristic facial appearance, renal anomalies and increased dosage of distal chromosome 15q
evidence.snippet: We provide further support for a distinct “15q overgrowth syndrome” caused by either trisomy or tetrasomy resulting in increased dosage of distal 15q.

evidence.reference_title: A recessive syndrome of intellectual disability, moderate overgrowth, and renal dysplasia predisposing to Wilms tumor is caused by a mutation inFIBPgene
evidence.snippet: The disease was mapped to 3p21.1‐p14.2 and 11q13.1‐q13.4, where an in‐frame insertion (c.175_176insTAA) inFIBPgene was revealed.

nodes.description: In another subtype branch, biallelic FIBP variants alter a fibroblast growth factor-signaling mediator and define an autosomal recessive overgrowth syndrome with developmental and renal involvement.

evidence.reference_title: A recessive syndrome of intellectual disability, moderate overgrowth, and renal dysplasia predisposing to Wilms tumor is caused by a mutation inFIBPgene
evidence.snippet: The disease was mapped to 3p21.1‐p14.2 and 11q13.1‐q13.4, where an in‐frame insertion (c.175_176insTAA) inFIBPgene was revealed.

evidence.reference_title: 15q overgrowth syndrome: A newly recognized phenotype associated with overgrowth, learning difficulties, characteristic facial appearance, renal anomalies and increased dosage of distal chromosome 15q
evidence.snippet: We provide further support for a distinct “15q overgrowth syndrome” caused by either trisomy or tetrasomy resulting in increased dosage of distal 15q.

nodes.description: Increased IGF1R dosage and expression amplify downstream growth signaling, contributing to postnatal overgrowth and syndromic developmental abnormalities.
nodes.id: IGF1R Overexpression and Growth Signaling Activation

evidence.reference_title: Chromosome 15 structural abnormalities: effect on IGF1R gene expression and function
evidence.snippet: We found a 1.8-fold increase in the IGF1R mRNA and a 1.3-fold increase in the IGF1R protein expression (P < 0.05).

nodes.description: Patient-derived fibroblasts with FIBP dysfunction show increased proliferative capacity, providing a cellular explanation for the overgrowth phenotype.

biological_processes: fibroblast growth factor receptor signaling pathway

evidence.reference_title: A recessive syndrome of intellectual disability, moderate overgrowth, and renal dysplasia predisposing to Wilms tumor is caused by a mutation inFIBPgene
evidence.snippet: The patients’ skin fibroblasts showed an increased proliferation capacity compared to the controls’ explaining the observed overgrowth phenotype.

nodes.description: Cognitive impairment or learning disability is a core neurodevelopmental feature across the recognized syndrome branches.

evidence.reference_title: 15q overgrowth syndrome: A newly recognized phenotype associated with overgrowth, learning difficulties, characteristic facial appearance, renal anomalies and increased dosage of distal chromosome 15q
evidence.snippet: In addition to the overgrowth and learning difficulties, all five had a characteristic facial appearance and three had renal anomalies.

evidence.reference_title: A recessive syndrome of intellectual disability, moderate overgrowth, and renal dysplasia predisposing to Wilms tumor is caused by a mutation inFIBPgene
evidence.snippet: The overgrowth phenotype in the patients was accompanied by developmental delay, learning disabilities, and variable congenital abnormalities.

nodes.description: Congenital renal malformations are a major syndromic feature and may include renal agenesis, horseshoe kidney, hydronephrosis, dysplasia, or nephromegaly depending on the genetic subtype.

evidence.reference_title: 15q overgrowth syndrome: A newly recognized phenotype associated with overgrowth, learning difficulties, characteristic facial appearance, renal anomalies and increased dosage of distal chromosome 15q
evidence.snippet: Renal anomalies included renal agenesis, horseshoe kidney, and hydronephrosis.

evidence.reference_title: A recessive syndrome of intellectual disability, moderate overgrowth, and renal dysplasia predisposing to Wilms tumor is caused by a mutation inFIBPgene
evidence.snippet: A recessive syndrome of intellectual disability, moderate overgrowth, and renal dysplasia predisposing to Wilms tumor is caused by a mutation inFIBPgene

nodes.description: Postnatal overgrowth or tall stature is a defining feature across the syndrome spectrum.

evidence.reference_title: 15q overgrowth syndrome: A newly recognized phenotype associated with overgrowth, learning difficulties, characteristic facial appearance, renal anomalies and increased dosage of distal chromosome 15q
evidence.snippet: Although most of the described patients have some learning difficulties and are overgrown,
